message:
feat: show reasoning, commands, and results in CLI output

Enrich agent events with missing data:
- plan_end: add assistant text and reasoning
- primitive_end: add output and error

Rewrite renderEvent with [agent_id] prefix, depth-based indentation,
key argument display for primitives, and output preview.

Add hierarchical session logging in Agent.run() — each agent writes
its own events to ${logBasePath}.jsonl, subagent logs nest under
${logBasePath}/subagents/. Factory wires logBasePath from genome.

Add logs/ to genome DIRS with .gitignore so logs aren't committed.
Fix pre-commit hook git env var contamination in worktrees.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,5 +1,7 @@
 #!/bin/sh
 # Pre-commit hook: lint, typecheck, test
+# Unset git env vars so child git operations in tests target their own repos
+unset GIT_DIR GIT_INDEX_FILE GIT_WORK_TREE GIT_OBJECT_DIRECTORY GIT_ALTERNATE_OBJECT_DIRECTORIES
 
 echo "Running biome check..."
 bun run check
